policies.inbound:
<cache-lookup-value key="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cacheKey"))" variable-name="accessToken" />
		
			
				
					@((string)context.Variables["tokenEndpoint"])
					POST
					
						application/x-www-form-urlencoded
					
					@{  
            var clientId = (string)context.Variables["clientId"];  
            var clientSecret = (string)context.Variables["clientSecret"];  
            var scope = (string)context.Variables["scope"];  
            return $"grant_type=client_credentials&scope={Uri.EscapeDataString(scope)}&client_id={Uri.EscapeDataString(clientId)}&client_secret={Uri.EscapeDataString(clientSecret)}";  
          }
				
				
					
						<set-variable name="accessToken" value="@{  
              var resp = (IResponse)context.Variables["tokenResponse"];  
              var jo = resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true);  
              return (string)jo["access_token"];  
            }" />
						<set-variable name="expiresIn" value="@{  
              var resp = (IResponse)context.Variables["tokenResponse"];  
              var jo = resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true);  
              var exp = (int?)jo["expires_in"] ?? 3600;  
              return (exp > 60 ? exp - 60 : exp);  
            }" />
						<cache-store-value key="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cacheKey"))" value="@((string)context.Variables["accessToken"])" duration="@((int)context.Variables["expiresIn"])" />
					
					
						
							
							
								application/json
							
							@{  
                var r = (IResponse)context.Variables["tokenResponse"];  
                var details = r.Body.As(preserveContent: true);  
                return $"{{\"message\":\"Failed to get access token\",\"status\":{(int)r.StatusCode},\"details\":{Newtonsoft.Json.JsonConvert.SerializeObject(details)} }}";  
              }
						
					
				
			
		
		
			@($"Bearer { (string)context.Variables["accessToken"] }")
		
		
			*/*
		
		
			no-cache
